Intent Classification LLM
Outputs: intent, confidence,
domain_relevance, needs_clarification

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
out_of_scope
Catalog-aware redirect:
'I can help with PowerDrill,
RoboCleaner, MegaBlender...'

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Answer from history
'You asked about RoboCleaner
pricing and UltraWasher warranty'

div.style: color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

Direct LLM response
No tools needed

Cleaning: RoboCleaner, SuperVac
Kitchen: MegaBlender, EcoKettle
Smart Home: SmartLamp, AirPurifier
